# About the Author {.unnumbered}

Alessandro Bessi is an AI expert, data scientist, and software engineer
whose work spans machine learning, complex systems, and the
infrastructure required to make intelligent systems work in practice.

He holds a PhD in Economics and Social Sciences and a master's degree in
Statistics, and has conducted international research in computer science
at the University of Southern California. He is the author of more than
forty scientific publications, cited thousands of times, with research
covering misinformation, online social systems, and computational
behaviour.

Since moving from academia into industry, he has worked on production
machine-learning systems, AI products, cloud infrastructure, and tools
designed to support better decisions and human development.
